results.title: Home Instead Survey Shows Self-Care Linked to Older Adult Happiness and Wellbeing
results.description: SAN MATEO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--A new survey by Home Instead, an Honor company, and the world’s leading provider of in-home care for older adults, finds that physical self-care routines play a key role in supporting confidence, happiness, and emotional wellbeing among adults aged 65 and older, while highlighting the critical support caregivers provide in helping maintain these routines.
